failures.description: The Executor misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch output. The correct result was 2 items, but it synthesized an unsupported answer claiming 9 options and a fabricated record id.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available bagged Vacuum Cleaners costing more than $591.59. The tool call was made correctly and returned 2 matching items with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At step 4, the Executor had the relevant tool output but produced an answer saying there are 9 options and referenced record 0000000000. This contradicts the tool result and relies on information not present in the evidence. The failure was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer.
